vocab.meaning: sự phấn khích vô tư/không kiềm chế
vocab.example: As a toddler, I felt a sense of uninhibited excitement every time we buckled up for a weekend getaway.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác cuồng chân/khó chịu do bị nhốt trong không gian hẹp quá lâu
vocab.example: Despite the fun, I often suffered from cabin fever during cross-country trips that lasted more than eight hours.

vocab.meaning: ru ai đó ngủ (bằng âm thanh hoặc chuyển động nhẹ nhàng)
vocab.example: The rhythmic humming of the engine and the vibration of the car would invariably lull me to sleep within minutes.
I used to press my face against the window to get a panoramic view of the rolling hills as we drove past.

vocab.meaning: niềm khao khát được đi du lịch/khám phá
vocab.example: Those early childhood road trips definitely sparked a lifelong sense of wanderlust in me.
